name: Language Suggestions
description: Detects missing resource language metadata from titles, descriptions, subjects and publisher context.

status_labels.completed_with_results: Language discovery completed: {count} new suggestion(s) found.
status_labels.completed_empty: Language discovery completed: No new suggestions found.
status_labels.already_running: A language discovery job is already running.

empty_state.title: No pending language suggestions
empty_state.description: No resources without language metadata were found.
